flags.content: 🚨 OCCUPANCY CONFLICT — Property is Tenant Occupied per underwriting, but policy carries endorsement DL 24 16 07 88 — "No Coverage for Non-Owner Occupied Dwellings." PA and management review required before strategy. Carrier will likely use this as a denial basis.

🚨 CALENDAR YEAR HURRICANE DEDUCTIBLE (DP 03 51 05 23) — Supplemental reporting requirement applies in Florida. Confirm whether any prior 2024 hurricane claim was filed. If already satisfied this calendar year, deductible may be $0. If not, full $5,382 applies.
⚠ EXISTING DAMAGE EXCLUSION (FIM 00 30 03 07) — Carrier will attempt to attribute roof wear on a 2006 roof (18 yrs) to this endorsement. Photo documentation of storm-specific damage is critical.
⚠ COSMETIC/AESTHETIC DAMAGE TO FLOORS (FIM 00 34 06 13) — Floor damage that is purely cosmetic may be excluded. Confirm functional damage if floors are added to scope.
⚠ SCREEN ENCLOSURE HURRICANE LIMITATION (FIM 00 18 12 23) — Verify at inspection whether a screen enclosure is present. Coverage limited if so.
ℹ ROOF AGE — 2006 roof, 18 years at date of loss. Depreciation applies. No roof payment schedule endorsement confirmed — carrier is on RCV basis per FIM DP 66 01 16.
